name: landmap
description: Plataforma de inteligência de dados imobiliários - open data e API aberta para cobrir todo o mercado.

scripts.markdown:all: python scripts/seed_properties.py && python scripts/build_markdowns.py && python scripts/validate_markdowns.py
scripts.vercel-build: pnpm --filter @landmap/config build && pnpm --filter @landmap/db build && pnpm --filter @landmap/geo build && pnpm --filter @landmap/integrations build && pnpm --filter @landmap/invest build && pnpm --filter @landmap/llm build && pnpm --filter @landmap/sales build && pnpm --filter @landmap/api build && pnpm --filter @landmap/ui build && pnpm --filter @landmap/web run build
